<table class="navbox">
<tr><th colspan="2" class="navbox-title">[[:Category:The Last Horizon|The Last Horizon]]</th></tr>
<tr><th class="navbox-label">Books</th><td class="navbox-data">[[The Captain (novel)|The Captain]] • [[The Engineer (novel)|The Engineer]] • [[The Knight (novel)|The Knight]] • [[The Pilot (novel)|The Pilot]]</td></tr>
<tr><th class="navbox-label">Magic</th><td class="navbox-data">[[Spellcraft]]</td></tr>
<tr><th class="navbox-label">Browse</th><td class="navbox-data">[[:Category:The Last Horizon characters|Characters]] • [[:Category:The Last Horizon locations|Locations]] • [[:Category:The Last Horizon groups|Groups]] • [[:Category:The Last Horizon events|Events]] • [[:Category:The Last Horizon|Everything]]</td></tr>
</table>
